instructions: This is a Next.js 15 monorepo. Focus on: (1) logic bugs and race conditions, (2) SQL/trust-boundary issues in apps/web/app/api/**, (3) auth gaps in Clerk integration, (4) cross-file impacts. Do NOT comment on: style, formatting, naming, import order, TSDoc presence, or test coverage — Biome and CodeRabbit cover these. Prefer silence over nits — strictness is 3 for a reason.
